name: Mr Ant Tenna
description:
It's spring time! And of course our favorite TV host (the one and only) is having a perfect charity contest for 24 hours straight! And it's..... Spring themed!
Afterall, who wouldn't want to show to all audiences that you can make a perfect flower crown. Choose your flowers, and let's get this show on the road!
Yet... You can't seem to help it, and gather a very unique flower from a very exciting host's nose...

This is before Kris and the gang, you can either be a Lightener or a Darkner.

I wasn't planning on uploading anything anymore- but I can'tttt, I love machine looking characters......adorable don't come for me.
